title: A Lost World - Dinosaurs in Cambodia
description: I cam across this 10th century carving in a Temple in Angkor Wat, Cambodia. My wife and I keep a blog of our travels at www.agapinthehimalayas.blogspot.com - if you fancy a read - we also have some other vidoes of our trips on www.youtube/user/backpackingdiary - Makes you think - how did the Cambodians know what a stegasaurus look like only 1,000 years ago? Where there really survivors from then?
